def positive_python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_busy_async_poll_sleep_zero():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_async_concurrency_busy_async_poll_sleep_zero"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag async polling loops that sleep(0) or spin instead of awaiting a real event."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
